Localization.Description: Attempt to rename or move a file object

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: File object "{object.fullpath}" is moved on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} renamed file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to rename a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} renamed the file object with inode {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
The file object with inode {object.id} is moved on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} renamed the file object with inode {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to move a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} failed to move a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} moved file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} renamed the file object with inode {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} moved the file object with inode {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to rename a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
The user with ID {subject.account.id} renamed file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} moved file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} failed to rename a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
File object "{object.fullpath}" is renamed on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} moved file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} moved the file object with inode {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} renamed file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to move a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
The file object with inode {object.id} is renamed on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} failed to move a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} moved the file object with inode {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to rename a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
